option.name: res
option.value:
Whitelabel Error Page

This application has no explicit mapping for /error, so you are seeing this as a fallback.

Thu May 14 13:20:08 SAST 2026
There was an unexpected error (type=Internal Server Error, status=500).
500 on GET request for "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/user/e97beaad-d6a2-48bf-a009-2c90b7d43860": "{"timestamp":"2026-05-14T11:20:08.298Z","status":500,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/api/v1/user/e97beaad-d6a2-48bf-a009-2c90b7d43860"}"

option.value:

This application has no explicit mapping for /error, so you are seeing this as a fallback.
